items.headline: 4 takeaways: Thunder deliver on both ends in Game 2 win, but lose Jalen Williams to injury
items.description: Oklahoma City's young core improves to 10-0 in first round playoff games with a 120-107 win over the Suns in Game 2.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Dominant 3rd quarter, Cade Cunningham carry Pistons in Game 2 victory
items.description: Detroit outscores Orlando 38-16 in the 3rd and Cunningham proves to be a nightmare matchup in a series-evening win.

items.headline: Thunder's Jalen Williams leaves Game 2 early with injury
items.description: OKC's star leaves in the 3rd quarter of Wednesday's playoff game against the Phoenix Suns with a left hamstring injury.

items.headline: Opening Sunday of NBA Playoffs registers largest audience in 15 years
items.description: The opening Sunday of the NBA Playoffs reaches more than 35 million viewers in the USA across ABC and NBC/Peacock.

items.headline: Recap: Pistons, Thunder roll to dominant victories
items.description: Check out the best of Wednesday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs, featuring Magic-Pistons and Suns-Thunder, with the NBA.com live blog.

items.headline: Spurs' Keldon Johnson named 2025-26 Kia NBA Sixth Man of the Year
items.description: Johnson, who set a Spurs franchise record with 1,081 bench points, joins Manu Ginobili as the only Spurs to win the award.

items.headline: The Athletic: VJ Edgecombe is mature beyond his years
items.description: Edgecombe scored 30 points and grabbed 10 rebounds Tuesday for the Sixers, who bounced back from an ugly Game 1 loss.

items.headline: SoFi NBA Play-In Tournament viewership increases 18% for inaugural season on Prime Video
items.description: The 2026 SoFi NBA Play-In Tournament averaged 2.79M U.S. viewers across 6 exclusive broadcast windows.

items.headline: The Athletic: How losing his brother taught Aaron Gordon ‘what life is really about’
items.description: After an unspeakable loss, the Denver Nuggets forward has immersed himself in passions.

items.headline: France to host men’s basketball World Cup in 2031
items.description: France was awarded the hosting rights to the 2031 men’s tournament by governing body FIBA on Wednesday, with Japan getting the 2030 Women’s World Cup.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Magic-Pistons Game 2
items.description: Detroit is hoping to match Orlando's physical intensity and play better in the paint as Game 2 approaches.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Thunder-Suns Game 2
items.description: Stopping Jalen Williams, plus ball movement and the play of a shooter like Grayson Allen could be key for the Suns in Game 2.

items.headline: Starting 5: Portland & Philly forge ties, Lakers go up 2-0
items.description: The Lakers take a 2-0 series edge while the 76ers and Blazers tie up their series, plus we look ahead to Wednesday's slate.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: LeBron James defies age as Lakers limit Kevin Durant to take 2-0 lead
items.description: The King refuses to let age slow him down and L.A.'s backcourt comes up big to help maintain home-court advantage.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Scoot Henderson emerges while the Spurs stumble without Victor Wembanyama
items.description: Portland takes advantage of Victor Wembayama's absence, leaning on Scoot Henderson's playoff career-high 31 to rally.
